case_title: BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. VS. ATES KARGIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARGIN, ATES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 173 HAIGHT STREET, #103, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.72 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. SERVED OCT-27-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
ORDER RE: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED OF MAR 7, 14 ORDER AND JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KARGIN, ATES
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KARGIN, ATES DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. SERVED OCT-27-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARGIN, ATES
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (AMENDED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KARGIN, ATES
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KARGIN, ATES
